issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://kinzhal.media/kak-vse-uspevat/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fkinzhal.media%2Fkak-vse-uspevat%2F) ### Comment > Два баннера на странице. Второй появляется при прокрутке страницы вниз. Аналогичное поведение и в мобильной версии. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/apq1g18zjn4sgogs48k4g04ko8cgssoch18iupqqs8.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 2 ![Screenshot 2](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/koqvq2cijyo8gk4wkkw44g4kwcgogscao55j47x0ag.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for Windows v7.22.7 (5271) System version: | `Microsoft Windows NT 10.0.26200.0` Browser: | Chrome License type: | paid AdGuard driver: | WFP Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter

**Social Widgets:**
AdGuard Social Media filter

**Annoyances:**
AdGuard Cookie Notices filter,
AdGuard Popups filter,
AdGuard Mobile App Banners filter,
AdGuard Other Annoyances filter,
AdGuard Widgets filter,
Fanboy's Annoyances

**Language-specific:**
AdGuard Russian filter,
AdBlockID,
EasyList Thailand,
ABPVN List,
Dandelion Sprout's Nordic Filters Custom filters: | `User rules (url: none)` Tracking protection: | **General**:
Block trackers,
Hide your search queries,
Send Do-Not-Track header

**Tracking Methods**:
Self-destructing third-party cookies (180h)

**Browser API**:
Block Flash

**Windows Tracking**:
Disable Windows Telemetry,
Turn off Advertising ID,
Disable Windows Defender automatic samples submission,
Disable WAP Push Message Routing Service,
Disable Windows Recall

**Miscellaneous**:
Remove X-Client-Data header from HTTP requests,
Protect against DPI DNS filtering: | server: `quic://dns.adguard-dns.com`
filters: `AdGuard DNS Filter`, `User rules (url: none)` Browsing Security: | enabled Browsing Security statistics: | disabled Userscripts: | `AdGuard Extra (url: https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/adguard-extra/1.0/adguard-extra.user.js)`
`AdGuard Popup Blocker (url: https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/popup-blocker/2.5/popupblocker.user.js)` Userstyles: | disabled ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=win&product_version=7.22.7+%285271%29&system_version=Microsoft+Windows+NT+10.0.26200.0&browser=chrome&filters=1.2.3.4.18.19.20.21.22.120.122.202.214.249&custom_filters=User+rules+%28url%3A+none%29&dns_servers=quic%3A%2F%2Fdns.adguard-dns.com&userscripts=AdGuard+Extra+%28url%3A+https%3A%2F%2Fuserscripts.adtidy.org%2Frelease%2Fadguard-extra%2F1.0%2Fadguard-extra.user.js%29%2C%0AAdGuard+Popup+Blocker+%28url%3A+https%3A%2F%2Fuserscripts.adtidy.org%2Frelease%2Fpopup-blocker%2F2.5%2Fpopupblocker.user.js%29&dns.filters=AdGuard+DNS+Filter%2C%0AUser+rules+%28url%3A+none%29&dns.filters_enabled=true&dns.enabled=true&browsing_security.enabled=true&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=true&stealth.webrtc=false&stealth.push=false&stealth.location=false&stealth.flash=true&stealth.java=false&stealth.strip_url=false&stealth.hide_search_queries=true&stealth.DNT=true&stealth.x_client=true&stealth.dpi=true&stealth.third_party_cookies=180&stealth.disable_third_party_cache=false&stealth.block_third_party_auth=false&stealth.block_trackers=true&stealth.disable_wap_push_message_routing_service=true&stealth.disable_windows_defender=true&stealth.disable_windows_telemetry=true&stealth.turn_off_advertising_id=true&win.wfp=true&license_type=paid&scheme_version=2&adblocking.enabled=true&dns.fallback_mode=System&stealth.disable_windows_recall=true)
